sqlMap.select: select * from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into TitleSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsApplMaintEquityInTitle PercentageOfEquityInt IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage NumberOfTitleIssued NumberOfTitleAttInFirm NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle NumberOfRealEstTitleIns PercentOfTitleFromResi PercentOfTitleFromComm PercentOfTitleFromAgri IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy TitleInsuranceCompany IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl NameAndReasonOfTitle LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy PercentOfTitleFromOther PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsApplMaintEquityInTitle# #PercentageOfEquityInt# #IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage# #NumberOfTitleIssued# #NumberOfTitleAttInFirm# #NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm# #NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm# #NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont# #IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle# #NumberOfRealEstTitleIns# #PercentOfTitleFromResi# #PercentOfTitleFromComm# #PercentOfTitleFromAgri# #IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle# #IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy# #TitleInsuranceCompany# #IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl# #NameAndReasonOfTitle# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy# #PercentOfTitleFromOther# #PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc# )
sqlMap.select: select IsApplMaintEquityInTitle, PercentageOfEquityInt, IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage, NumberOfTitleIssued, NumberOfTitleAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont, IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle, NumberOfRealEstTitleIns, PercentOfTitleFromResi, PercentOfTitleFromComm, PercentOfTitleFromAgri, IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle, IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy, TitleInsuranceCompany, IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl, NameAndReasonOfTitle, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy, PercentOfTitleFromOther, PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update TitleSuppLW set
IsApplMaintEquityInTitle = #IsApplMaintEquityInTitle# IsApplMaintEquityInTitle = null PercentageOfEquityInt = #PercentageOfEquityInt# PercentageOfEquityInt = null IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage = #IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage# IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage = null NumberOfTitleIssued = #NumberOfTitleIssued# NumberOfTitleIssued = null NumberOfTitleAttInFirm = #NumberOfTitleAttInFirm# NumberOfTitleAttInFirm = null NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm = #NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm# NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm = null NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm = #NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm# NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm = null NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont = #NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont# NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont = null IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle = #IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle# IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle = null NumberOfRealEstTitleIns = #NumberOfRealEstTitleIns# NumberOfRealEstTitleIns = null PercentOfTitleFromResi = #PercentOfTitleFromResi# PercentOfTitleFromResi = null PercentOfTitleFromComm = #PercentOfTitleFromComm# PercentOfTitleFromComm = null PercentOfTitleFromAgri = #PercentOfTitleFromAgri# PercentOfTitleFromAgri = null IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle = #IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle# IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle = null IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy = #IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy# IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy = null TitleInsuranceCompany = #TitleInsuranceCompany# TitleInsuranceCompany = null IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl = #IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl# IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl = null NameAndReasonOfTitle = #NameAndReasonOfTitle# NameAndReasonOfTitle = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy = #IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy# IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy = null PercentOfTitleFromOther = #PercentOfTitleFromOther# PercentOfTitleFromOther = null PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc = #PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc# PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsApplMaintEquityInTitle, PercentageOfEquityInt, IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage, NumberOfTitleIssued, NumberOfTitleAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont, IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle, NumberOfRealEstTitleIns, PercentOfTitleFromResi, PercentOfTitleFromComm, PercentOfTitleFromAgri, IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle, IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy, TitleInsuranceCompany, IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl, NameAndReasonOfTitle, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy, PercentOfTitleFromOther, PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsApplMaintEquityInTitle, PercentageOfEquityInt, IsTitleHaveProfLiabCoverage, NumberOfTitleIssued, NumberOfTitleAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleAttNotInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttInFirm, NumberOfTitleNonAttSubCont, IsApplObtCertOfInsOfTitle, NumberOfRealEstTitleIns, PercentOfTitleFromResi, PercentOfTitleFromComm, PercentOfTitleFromAgri, IsFirmUseEngageLetterOfTitle, IsTitleInsAgencyIssuePolicy, TitleInsuranceCompany, IsTitleInsDeclineToAppl, NameAndReasonOfTitle, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplCovProfLiabPolicy, PercentOfTitleFromOther, PercentOfTitleFromOther_CommentDesc from TitleSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
